notes: Spec asserts: ready → working → ready when the user cancels a long turn with ESC; state does not stick in working post-interrupt. The agent writes a user message whose content begins with '[Request interrupted by user]'; parser.recordUserInterruptFlags sets ev.IsUserInterrupt=true, tailer promotes it to LastWasUserInterrupt, and classifier rule 3 drives working→ready. Final state = ready.

text: ESC interrupt writes '[Request interrupted by user]' marker → rule 3 drives working → ready (LastWasUserInterrupt + LastEventType=user + !HasOpenToolCall)
